title: Allow package scoped functions to be called without arguments

features.name: package_scoped_function_call_no_arguments
features.description: Code should include a package-scoped function call with no arguments using the :: operator

features.name: package_scoped_function_call_empty_positional_arguments
features.description: Code should include a package-scoped function call with empty positional arguments where some arguments have default values

features.name: package_defined_function_with_default_arguments
features.description: Code should include a package containing a function with default argument values
